videos.headline: Rayuan Lane III returns an 86-yard INT to the house to cap Navy win
videos.description: Rayuan Lane III makes a spectacular leap to snag an interception and goes 86-yards for the late score in Navy's win against Memphis.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rayuan Lane III returns an 86-yard INT to the house to cap Navy win) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Horvath launches 39-yard Navy TD pass to Eli Heidenreich
videos.description: Blake Horvath delivers a sharp pass to Eli Heidenreich, who secures a 39-yard touchdown to level Memphis.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath launches 39-yard Navy TD pass to Eli Heidenreich) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Horvath runs off with 90-yard Navy TD
videos.description: Blake Horvath breaks loose and sprints 90 yards to the end zone for a thrilling touchdown for Navy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath runs off with 90-yard Navy TD) 2024/09/21 ESHEET
